infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: BabyScan AI uses the camera to capture baby scans, X-rays, and hospital document photos for analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: BabyScan AI accesses your photo library to select baby scans, X-rays, and hospital document photos.
